title: The Surprise.
content:
Chloris, I swear, by all I ever swore,
    That from this hour I shall not love thee more.--
    "What! love no more? Oh! why this altered vow?"
    Because I can not love thee more
        --than now!
meaning:
Thomas Moore's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Surprise."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
